tasks.label: reason-mcp: Start ArangoDB
tasks.detail: Start ArangoDB via Docker with --vector-index enabled (detached). Requires Docker and REASON_ARANGO_PASSWORD in .env.

tasks.label: reason-mcp: Seed ArangoDB
tasks.detail: Generate embeddings for all rules and upsert them into ArangoDB. Run this after editing any rule JSON file.

tasks.label: reason-mcp: Seed ArangoDB (dry run)
tasks.detail: Dry-run seed: generate embeddings and print what would be written, without touching ArangoDB.

tasks.label: reason-mcp: Start Server
tasks.detail: Start the reason-mcp server. ArangoDB credentials are loaded from .env.
